title: GhostSuperItem
description: it added a item to remove Player Forcibly,through right clicking when you holding the item,you will die.So, you can use it to do something that can't be accomplished in the original Minecraft,Besides,The item's FontRenderer is costumised so ,it's colorful.
body:
This mod has no synthesis table, the weapons in it are very awesome, not suitable for generating and using this Mod has no synthesis table, the weapons in it are very excessive and can kill almost all players, not suitable for survival. The Mod that can kill almost all players with this mod is an artifact Mod. The weapon damage in this mod is very high. Can KILL almost all players, this item has cool color characters and tiles, and in the subsequent version, will add more fun features, welcome to download and play!
